NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF WEAVER, JONATHAN SCOTT ON JAN-14-2005 THROUGH JAN-17-2005 AND ALSO JANUARY 24, 2005 THROUGH JANUARY 31, 2005 FILED BY DEFENDANT TURNER, DEBORAH TANNER, DEBORAH

MOTION TO COMPEL ENTRY AND INSPECTION, AND FOR SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT TURNER, DEBORAH HEARING SET FOR JAN-18-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: J. SCOTT WEAVER, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, DEBORAH TURNER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ENTRY AND INSPECTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO ALLOW ENTRY AND INSPECTION NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 1, 2005. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE NOTICE OF ENTRY AND INSPECTION WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,090, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT`
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MARQUEZ, JAK STEVEN SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR FENG, EDWARD
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FENG, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, DEBORAH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
